hooks.command: [ -d wiki ] && [ -f wiki/hot.md ] && echo 'WIKIVAULT ACTIVE: you are inside a valid vault. In your first response, communicate this briefly to the user (one line).'

hooks.prompt: Hook-injected context does not survive context compaction. If wiki/hot.md exists in the current directory, silently re-read it now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: cd "$PWD" && [ -d wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely. It is a cache, not a journal.' || true
